title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Arsenal on alert...
summary: PSG forward Bradley Barcola is attracting attention from Premier League clubs Liverpool and Arsenal, indicating potential summer transfer activity among Europe's top teams. This competition for elite attacking talent highlights the significance of the upcoming transfer window.
content: Paris Saint-Germain's Bradley Barcola has Liverpool and Arsenal interested. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传闻：利物浦、阿森纳保持警惕
zh.summary: PSG前锋布拉德利·巴尔科拉吸引了英超豪门利物浦和阿森纳的关注，表明欧洲顶级球队之间可能的夏季转会活动。对于精英锋线人才的竞争突出了即将到来的转会窗口的重要性。

title: From crisis to survival belief, Roberto De Zerbi s...
summary: Tottenham has climbed out of the relegation zone under new manager Roberto De Zerbi, following a significant victory at Villa Park. This turnaround demonstrates how managerial change can rapidly transform a struggling club's prospects and team morale.
content: Tottenham are out of the relegation zone, and the relief was palpable at Villa Park. ESPN's Aiman Khalid reports from a big win for Spurs, and new boss Roberto De Zerbi.

zh.title: 从危机到保级信念，罗伯托·德泽尔比
zh.summary: 在新任主帅罗伯托·德泽尔比的领导下，托特纳姆热刺在维拉公园的重要胜利后，已经爬出降级区。这一逆转表明主教练的更换如何能迅速改变困境中球队的前景和士气。

title: Should Man United hire Carrick now they're back in...
summary: Manchester United secured Champions League qualification by defeating Liverpool, raising questions about interim manager Michael Carrick's future with the club. This victory strengthens the case for Carrick's permanent appointment after stabilizing the team's season.
content: Man United clinched a return to Champions League action by beating Liverpool: Does this guarantee Michael Carrick gets the permanent job?

zh.title: 曼联现在应该聘用卡里克吗他们已回到
zh.summary: 曼联通过击败利物浦获得欧冠资格，引发了对代理主帅迈克尔·卡里克未来的疑问。这场胜利强化了卡里克在稳定球队赛季后获得永久任职的理由。

title: Why central midfielders are this summer's biggest ...
summary: Central midfielders have emerged as the most sought-after positions in the summer transfer market, with the best available players commanding significant interest from top clubs. This reflects the growing tactical emphasis on midfield control in modern football.
content: The most in-demand players this summer all have one thing in common: They are the best-available central midfielders.

zh.title: 为什么中场球员是今夏最大的转会热点
zh.summary: 中场球员已成为今夏转会市场上最炙手可热的位置，最优秀的可用球员吸引了众多豪门的极大关注。这反映了现代足球对中场控制权的日益增长的战术重视。

title: Why are McBurnie and Stewart not in World Cup mix?
summary: Scotland's two most in-form strikers, Oli McBurnie and Ross Stewart, appear to have been excluded from manager Steve Clarke's World Cup squad despite their strong recent performances. This raises questions about squad selection criteria and tactical decisions ahead of the tournament.
content: Oli McBurnie and Ross Stewart are arguably Scotland's two most in-form strikers, yet neither appear to be in Steve Clarke's World Cup plans, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 为什么麦柏尼和斯图尔特未入选世界杯名单？
zh.summary: 苏格兰状态最好的两名前锋奥利·麦柏尼和罗斯·斯图尔特似乎被主教练史蒂夫·克拉克排除在世界杯大名单之外，尽管他们最近表现出色。这引发了对选队标准和锦标赛前战术决定的质疑。

title: Manager Marcelino to leave Villarreal
summary: Villarreal manager Marcelino is departing the club at season's end after three years in charge, signaling a managerial transition for the Spanish side. This change marks the end of an era and opens the door for new leadership at the club.
content: Manager Marcelino will leave Villarreal at the end of the season after three years in charge.

zh.title: 主教练马塞利诺离开比利亚雷亚尔
zh.summary: 比利亚雷亚尔主教练马塞利诺在执教三年后将在赛季末离开该俱乐部，标志着这支西班牙球队的主教练更替。这一变化标志着一个时代的结束，为新的领导层打开了大门。

title: ⚽Bizarre OG sees match-fixing probe in Panama
summary: Panama's football league is investigating suspected match-fixing following a suspicious own goal in a recent match. This incident highlights ongoing concerns about match integrity in some football leagues worldwide.
content: The Panamanian Football League has launched an official investigation after a bizarre own goal prompted suspicions of match-fixing.

zh.title: ⚽离奇乌龙球引发巴拿马赛场操纵调查
zh.summary: 巴拿马足球联赛正在调查一桩疑似赛场操纵事件,起因是一记可疑的乌龙球。这一事件突显了全球部分足球联赛在比赛完整性方面持续存在的担忧。

title: Pep: I have 'incredible energy' amid title race
summary: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola expressed confidence in his energy and mental state despite the intensity of pursuing a treble (three major trophies in one season). His remarks suggest the club remains focused and resilient amid mounting competitive pressure.
content: Pep Guardiola said he still has "incredible energy" for his job at Manchester City -- and feels calmer despite the pressures of a treble challenge.

zh.title: 瓜帅:在争冠期间我精力充沛
zh.summary: 曼城主帅瓜迪奥拉表达了对自己精力和心理状态的信心,尽管追求三冠王(一个赛季赢得三项主要奖杯)的强度很大。他的言论表明该俱乐部在日益激烈的竞争压力下保持专注和韧性。

title: 'Born leader' Vini helps Madrid delay Barça title
summary: Real Madrid defeated Espanyol 2-0 with Vinícius Júnior scoring twice, delaying Barcelona's LaLiga title win and keeping the race competitive. The performance reinforces Vinicius's importance to Madrid's title aspirations as a key leader on the pitch.
content: Coach Álvaro Arbeloa called Vinícius Júnior a "born leader" after the forward scored twice as Real Madrid won 2-0 at Espanyol to avoid handing Barcelona the LaLiga title.

zh.title: '天生领导者'维尼帮皇马延缓巴萨夺冠
zh.summary: 皇马以2:0战胜西班牙人队,维尼修斯梅开二度,延缓了巴萨的西甲夺冠,使争冠形势保持悬念。这场表现强化了维尼修斯作为球场上关键领导者对皇马夺冠抱负的重要性。

title: Inter Milan win to clinch club's 21st Serie A titl...
summary: Inter Milan clinched the Serie A title for the second time in three seasons, claiming their 21st Scudetto in club history. This achievement demonstrates their sustained excellence and dominance in Italian football.
content: Inter Milan have been crowned Serie A champions, winning the Scudetto for the second time in the past three seasons.

zh.title: 国际米兰赢球获得俱乐部第21个意甲冠军
zh.summary: 国际米兰在三个赛季内第二次赢得意甲冠军，创造了俱乐部历史上的第21个斯库德托。这一成就展示了他们在意大利足球中持续的卓越表现和主导地位。

title: Al Nassr 20-game win streak ends in title stumble
summary: Saudi Arabia's Al Nassr suffered a 3-1 defeat to Al Qadsiah, ending their impressive 20-game winning streak. This loss impacts their title hopes and demonstrates the vulnerability of even dominant streaks in competitive leagues.
content: Al Nassr saw their 20-game winning streak come to an end on Sunday in a 3-1 loss to Al Qadsiah.

zh.title: 纳赛尔队20连胜纪录在争冠中中断
zh.summary: 沙特阿拉伯纳赛尔队以3:1不敌卡迪亚队，他们令人印象深刻的20场连胜纪录就此中断。这场失利影响了他们的争冠希望，证明了即使是强势的连胜纪录在竞争激烈的联赛中也存在脆弱性。

title: Boston wins first-ever NWSL game; Thorns cruise
summary: Expansion club Boston Legacy recorded their first-ever NWSL regular-season victory with a 3-2 win over Denver Summit, with Bianca St-Georges scoring the decisive goal in stoppage time. This milestone marks an important early success for the new franchise.
content: Bianca St-Georges scored in stoppage time and the Boston Legacy defeated the Denver Summit 3-2 on Sunday for the expansion club's first regular-season win.

zh.title: 波士顿赢得首次NWSL比赛；刺队顺利取胜
zh.summary: 扩展球队波士顿传奇队以3:2战胜丹佛峰队，赢得了他们首次NWSL常规赛胜利，比安卡·圣乔治在伤停补时阶段打进制胜球。这个里程碑标志着这支新球队的重要早期成功。

title: Sources: Neymar has training spat with Robinho Jr....
summary: Neymar clashed with Santos teammate Robinho Jr. during training over a perceived slight during a dribbling moment, sources report. The incident raises questions about team dynamics at the Brazilian club and player relationships.
content: Neymar had an altercation with teammate Robinho Jr. -- the son of former Real Madrid and Manchester City forward Robinho -- during Sunday's Santos training after he felt disrespected when the teenager dribbled past him, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士:内马尔与罗比尼奥Jr.在训练中发生冲突
zh.summary: 消息人士报道，内马尔在训练中因传球时被轻视而与圣图斯队友罗比尼奥Jr.发生冲突。这一事件引发了对巴西俱乐部球队动力和球员关系的质疑。

title: Unacceptable season cannot be repeated - Van Dijk
summary: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk criticized his team's season as "unacceptable" after suffering their 18th defeat across all competitions. His comments reflect frustration at Anfield over a disappointing campaign that has fallen short of expectations.
content: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk says his side's season has been "unacceptable" following an 18th defeat in all competitions.

zh.title: 无法接受的赛季不能重演 - 范迪克
zh.summary: 利物浦队长维吉尔·范迪克在球队在所有赛事中遭遇第18场失利后，批评球队的赛季"无法接受"。他的评论反映了对安菲尔德一个令人失望且未达预期赛季的沮丧。

title: Carrick has the Ferguson magic, says Cunha
summary: Manchester United striker Matheus Cunha expressed confidence in interim manager Michael Carrick's ability to restore the club's winning tradition and legacy. His endorsement suggests the squad has responded positively to Carrick's leadership.
content: Manchester United forward Matheus Cunha believes interim boss Michael Carrick is the perfect man to reconnect the club to its trophy-laden past.

zh.title: 库尼亚说卡里克拥有弗格森的魔力
zh.summary: 曼联前锋马蒂乌斯·库尼亚表示对临时经理迈克尔·卡里克恢复俱乐部赢球传统和遗产能力的信心。他的认可表明球队对卡里克的领导做出了积极回应。

title: Renaud to seal summer move to Hearts - gossip
summary: A French midfielder is close to joining Hearts, while the club is also linked with a young defender currently on loan in Northern Ireland. The transfer activity suggests Hearts are strengthening ahead of the new season.
content: Hearts linked with young defender on loan in Northern Ireland as French midfielder moves closer to Tynecastle switch.

zh.title: 雷诺将确定夏季加盟Hearts - 传言
zh.summary: 一名法国中场球员即将加盟Hearts，同时该俱乐部还与目前在北爱尔兰租借的一名年轻后卫相关联。转会活动表明Hearts正在为新赛季进行加强。

title: Davide Ancelotti: My game in my words
summary: Brazil's assistant manager Davide Ancelotti discusses his coaching philosophy and approach to the game in an interview with BBC Sport. The conversation explores his tactical influences and coaching ideals.
content: Brazil assistant manager Davide Ancelotti sits down with BBC Sport's tactics expert Umir Irfan to discuss his coaching philosophy, inspirations and ideals.

zh.title: 达维德·安切洛蒂：用我的话讲述我的比赛
zh.summary: 巴西助理教练达维德·安切洛蒂在接受BBC体育采访时讨论了他的执教哲学和比赛方法。对话探讨了他的战术影响和教练理想。

title: Hearts trio pick up PFA Scotland prizes
summary: Hearts swept the major PFA Scotland awards with Claudio Braga winning Premiership Player of the Year and manager Derek McInnes and Eva Olid claiming managerial honors. The triple success reflects Hearts' strong 2025-26 season.
content: Claudio Braga is the is the PFA Scotland Premiership Player of the Year, with Derek McInnes and Eva Olid making it a managerial double for the Tynecastle club.

zh.title: Hearts三人获得苏格兰职业足球运动员协会奖项
zh.summary: Hearts包揽了主要的苏格兰职业足球运动员协会奖项，克劳迪奥·布拉加赢得英超联赛年度最佳球员，经理德里克·麦金尼斯和埃娃·奥利德获得了管理荣誉。三项成功反映了Hearts在2025-26赛季的强势表现。

title: What happened to Everton's £40m signing Dibling?
summary: BBC Sport examines the trajectory of Tyler Dibling, Everton's £40 million signing, questioning why the young talent hasn't made the expected impact. The analysis explores what the future may hold for the struggling investment.
content: The curious case of Tyler Dibling - BBC Sport chief football writers asks what has happened to Everton's £40m youngster and what does the future hold?

zh.title: 埃弗顿4000万英镑签约迪布林后发生了什么?
zh.summary: BBC体育频道分析了埃弗顿4000万英镑签约球员泰勒·迪布林的职业轨迹，质疑这位年轻天才为何未能达到预期效果。分析探讨了这笔困难投资的未来前景。

title: North Korean side to make rare trip to South Korea
summary: A North Korean football team will make a rare visit to South Korea later in May, marking an uncommon sporting exchange between the two nations. The trip represents a notable diplomatic gesture through sports.
content: A team of North Korean footballers will make a rare visit to South Korea later this month.

zh.title: 朝鲜球队将罕见造访韩国
zh.summary: 一支朝鲜足球队将在5月下旬罕见地访问韩国，标志着两国之间不常见的体育交流。该访问代表了通过体育进行的重要外交姿态。

title: 'Premflix' and tourist fans - future of football predictions
summary: Former broadcasting executive Neil Duncanson and author Alex Fynn, known for accurate football predictions in 1994, discuss their vision for the sport's future over the next decade. Their predictions explore changes in broadcasting, fan engagement, and the overall landscape of professional football.
content: Former broadcasting executive Neil Duncanson and author Alex Fynn, who made remarkably accurate predictions about football's future in 1994, discuss what the game will look like in 10 years' time.

zh.title: "Premflix"与观光球迷——足球未来预测
zh.summary: 以1994年精准足球预测而闻名的前广播高管尼尔·邓卡森和作家亚历克斯·芬恩讨论了他们对未来十年体育发展的愿景。他们的预测探讨了广播、球迷参与度和职业足球整体格局的变化。
